name: Defenders of the Iron Wall
description: Defensive specialists. Grand Cannons, elite Janissaries, marksmen from the Wall.
add_rules: Far from the Sublime Gate: No Lions, Yüzbaşı, or Assassins. No Cloak of Alamut or Wind Amulet.
Grand Cannons: 0-2 Grand Cannons (60d each). Given to Brazen Bull or as gun battery.
Janissary Officers: Janissaries (max 2) gain ELITE for free.
Marksmanship of the Iron Wall: +2 DICE (instead of +1) for Elevated Position.
Siege Jezzail Teams: +1 DICE for Siege Jezzail if friendly within 1".
Silahdar: Leader uses Yüzbaşı profile but replaces Mubarizun with STRONG.
Sipahi: 0-2 Sipahi (Janissary profile, STRONG, can use Automaton Horse for deployment).

abilities: Uses Yüzbaşı profile. STRONG replaces Mubarizun.
Can have Alaybozan, Anqā Guard, and Explosive Charges from the Sapper armoury.
Automaton Horse: Can deploy as INFILTRATOR in scenarios allowing it.
Stationary artillery piece. Cannot move. Not a model — cannot be targeted in melee.
Fires as per Grand Cannon rules. Requires crew (friendly model within 1") to fire.
